description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface for enhanced grip. The ball features classic black channel lines dividing the surface into eight panels, which are symmetrically arranged. Prominently displayed on one side is the Spalding brand logo, along with the NBA logo, both printed in black. The ball appears to be made of synthetic leather or composite material, with an air-filled interior that gives it a slightly rounded, resilient shape. There are no visible signs of wear, scuff marks, or graffiti, and the surface finish is matte with a grippy tactile quality. The inflation valve is not visible in any of the provided views.
description: A classic orange basketball with black channel lines, Spalding and NBA logos, and a textured, grippy surface. The ball is clean, well-defined, and appears new.
description_view_0: The basketball is shown with its pebbled orange surface and black channel lines, with no visible logos or markings.
description_view_1: This view displays the Spalding brand logo and NBA logo in black, along with the channel lines and textured surface.
description_view_2: The ball's orange surface and black channel lines are visible, with only a partial glimpse of the logos on the left edge.
description_view_3: The basketball is shown with its orange surface and black channel lines, with no visible logos or markings.
attribute_brand_logo: Spalding logo and NBA logo, both in black, located on one panel of the ball (visible in view 1).
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with black channel lines forming symmetrical, curved sections.
